things.name: Cite de l'Espace
things.description: Space theme park with life-size Ariane 5 rocket replica and real Mir space station module

things.name: Basilique Saint-Sernin
things.description: Largest Romanesque church in Europe and UNESCO pilgrimage site on the Camino de Santiago

things.name: Capitole de Toulouse
things.description: Stunning city hall with magnificent Hall des Illustres and the city's main square

things.name: Les Jacobins
things.description: Gothic Dominican church with a famous palm tree column and Toulouse-Lautrec's tomb

things.name: Musee des Augustins
things.description: Fine arts museum in a former Augustinian convent with superb Romanesque sculpture

things.name: Canal du Midi
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 17th-century canal lined with plane trees passing through the city

things.name: Aeroscopia
things.description: Aerospace museum with Concorde and original Airbus aircraft, gateway to Airbus factory tour

things.name: Prairie des Filtres
things.description: Riverside park along the Garonne with views of the Pont Neuf and city skyline

things.name: Musee Saint-Raymond
things.description: Archaeology museum with outstanding Roman sculpture in a 16th-century building

things.name: Victor Hugo Market
things.description: Covered market with Toulouse specialities including cassoulet and violet-based products
